name: arcgentic
description: Agentic harness for rigorous round-driven development. Orchestrates planning, execution, external audit, and reference tracking across roles — with mechanically verifiable state machine, fact-table audit gates, and lesson codification.
author: Arc Studio
status: alpha.2 — MVP four-pack landed (5 skills + 2 sub-agents + state machine + 3 gates + 9 test files / 48 assertions). Gate 1 structural-fidelity PASS against Moirai R10-L3-llm; Gate 2 live-run dogfood PASS; Gate 3 cross-project deferred to pre-v1.0
